title: DEKTON Red Release 24MM x 5M Heavy Duty Double-Sided Mounting Tape | Strong Sticky Foam Tape for Picture Hanging | Replaces Nails, Screws, and Tacks | Holds Up to 1Kg | Long-Lasting and Easy to Use
features: Heavy Duty Double-Sided Tape: The Dekton mounting tape offers strong adhesive power, making it ideal for heavy-duty applications. It replaces the need for nails, screws, or tacks and can securely hold pictures, signs, or decor up to 1kg on various surfaces.

Easy to Use: Designed for hassle-free mounting, simply cut the tape to the desired length, peel off the backing, and press onto the surface. Its double-sided adhesive ensures a strong bond, making mounting quick and convenient.
Long-Lasting Hold: Built to last, the heavy-duty foam tape provides a secure, long-lasting grip that maintains its strength over time, making it perfect for both indoor and outdoor use.

Multipurpose Application: Ideal for mounting photos, artwork, hooks, signs, and small mirrors. Suitable for use on various surfaces like walls, wood, metal, plastic, and glass, making it versatile for home, office, or workshop needs.
5M x 24MM Size: Each roll contains 5 meters of 24mm-wide tape, providing enough material for multiple projects, ensuring you have enough for all your mounting needs.
description: The Dekton Red Release 5M x 24MM Mounting Tape is a heavy-duty double-sided sticky foam tape designed to make mounting objects fast and easy. This versatile tape is a perfect replacement for nails, screws, or tacks, providing a secure hold on a variety of surfaces, including walls, wood, metal, plastic, and glass. With a maximum load capacity of 1kg, it’s ideal for mounting pictures, signs, small mirrors, hooks, and more. The strong adhesive ensures a long-lasting grip, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. Each roll offers 5 meters of tape, giving you ample material for multiple projects. The easy-to-use design allows you to cut the desired length, peel off the backing, and mount your item securely. Whether you're decorating your home, organizing your office, or working in the workshop, this heavy-duty tape is a reliable solution for all your mounting needs.
